---
title: "Figure 2"
subtitle: "Posterior estimates of (A) mean log response ratios (lnRR) for species richness and (B) species-level heterogeneity (σ_species) for fragment–continuous forest (F-C) and fragment–fragment (F-F) comparisons. "
author: "Dillan Hoyt"
execute: 
  eval: true
  echo: false
  message: false
editor: visual
toc: true
toc-depth: 3
toc-title: Contents
---
```{r}
library(brms)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggdist)
library(patchwork)

meta_SR_All <- read.csv("meta_SR_All.csv")
model_sr_all_full <- readRDS("m_sr_all_new.rds")

comp_levels <- c("Frag_vs_Cont", "Frag_vs_Frag")
comp_labels <- c(
  "Frag_vs_Cont" = "Fragment vs. continuous forest",
  "Frag_vs_Frag" = "Fragment vs. fragment"
)

my_cols_strong <- c(
  "Frag_vs_Cont" = "#238b45",
  "Frag_vs_Frag" = "#2171b5"
)

median_vi_val <- median(meta_SR_All$vi, na.rm = TRUE)
if (!is.finite(median_vi_val)) median_vi_val <- 0.2

matrix_ref <- "Agriculture"
forest_ref <- "Temperate"

newdata_A <- tibble(
  Comparison = factor(comp_levels, levels = comp_levels),
  log_forest_area_ref_s = 0,
  Elevation_s = 0,
  Rainfall_mm_s = 0,
  Latitude_s = 0,
  Longitude_s = 0,
  Matrix_mean = factor(matrix_ref, levels = levels(model_sr_all_full$data$Matrix_mean)),
  Forest_Group = factor(forest_ref, levels = levels(model_sr_all_full$data$Forest_Group)),
  vi = median_vi_val,
  se_obs = sqrt(median_vi_val)
)

post_draws <- fitted(
  model_sr_all_full,
  newdata = newdata_A,
  re_formula = NA,
  summary = FALSE
)

post_df <- as_tibble(post_draws)
colnames(post_df) <- as.character(newdata_A$Comparison)

draws_long <- post_df %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything(), names_to = "Comparison", values_to = "lnRR") %>%
  mutate(Comparison = factor(Comparison, levels = comp_levels))

sd_summary_95 <- draws_long %>%
  group_by(Comparison) %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(lnRR, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower95 = quantile(lnRR, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper95 = quantile(lnRR, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

sd_summary_66 <- draws_long %>%
  group_by(Comparison) %>%
  summarise(
    lower66 = quantile(lnRR, 0.17, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper66 = quantile(lnRR, 0.83, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

summ_df <- sd_summary_95 %>%
  left_join(sd_summary_66, by = "Comparison")

p_a <- ggplot(summ_df, aes(y = Comparison)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = lower95, xend = upper95, yend = Comparison, color = Comparison),
    linewidth = 1.0
  ) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = lower66, xend = upper66, yend = Comparison, color = Comparison),
    linewidth = 2.8
  ) +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = median, color = Comparison),
    size = 6
  ) +
  geom_vline(
    xintercept = 0,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "grey40",
    linewidth = 0.8
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = my_cols_strong, guide = "none") +
  scale_y_discrete(
    limits = rev(comp_levels),
    labels = comp_labels,
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0.3, 0.3))
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "A. Estimated mean lnRR by comparison type",
    x = "Estimated mean lnRR (population level)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    panel.grid.major = element_line(color = "grey85"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_line(color = "grey92"),
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold")
  )

print(p_a)

# Figure 2B: Posterior distributions of species-level SD

fit_b <- readRDS("m_batTraits_species.uncorr1_student.rds")
draws_b <- posterior::as_draws_df(fit_b)

candidate_sd_names <- grep(
  "^sd[_\\.].*Species|sd\\(Species",
  names(draws_b),
  value = TRUE,
  ignore.case = TRUE
)

sd_intercept_col <- candidate_sd_names[grepl("Intercept", candidate_sd_names, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]
sd_slope_col     <- candidate_sd_names[grepl("Comparison", candidate_sd_names, ignore.case = TRUE)][1]


sd_all <- tibble(
  sd_species = c(
    as.numeric(draws_b[[sd_intercept_col]]),
    as.numeric(draws_b[[sd_slope_col]])
  ),
  contrast = factor(
    rep(
      c("Fragment vs Continuous", "Fragment vs Fragment"),
      each = nrow(draws_b)
    ),
    levels = c("Fragment vs Continuous", "Fragment vs Fragment")
  )
)

sd_summary_b <- sd_all %>%
  group_by(contrast) %>%
  summarise(
    median = median(sd_species, na.rm = TRUE),
    lower = quantile(sd_species, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE),
    upper = quantile(sd_species, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

pal_fill_b <- c("Fragment vs Continuous" = "#74c69d", "Fragment vs Fragment" = "#74a9cf")
pal_color_b <- c("Fragment vs Continuous" = "#238b45", "Fragment vs Fragment" = "#225ea8")

xmax <- max(sd_all$sd_species, na.rm = TRUE) * 1.15

p_b <- ggplot() +
  stat_halfeye(
    data = sd_all,
    aes(x = sd_species, y = 0, fill = contrast),
    .width = c(0.66, 0.95),
    height = 0.58,
    alpha = 0.7,
    adjust = 0.7,
    slab_alpha = 0.75,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_errorbarh(
    data = sd_summary_b,
    aes(xmin = lower, xmax = upper, y = 0, color = contrast),
    height = 0.01,
    linewidth = 0.9,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = sd_summary_b,
    aes(x = median, y = 0, color = contrast),
    size = 3,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = pal_fill_b, name = NULL) +
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_color_b, guide = "none") +
  labs(
    title = "B. Posterior distributions of species-level SD",
    x = expression(sigma[species]),
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 20),
    axis.text.y = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.y = element_blank()
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, xmax), ylim = c(0, 0.55))

p_b
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Combine and save
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
p_final <- p_a + p_b + plot_layout(ncol = 2, widths = c(0.5, 0.5))
print(p_final)

ggsave(
  filename = "Fig2_ab_reviewers.tiff",
  plot = p_final,
  device = "tiff",
  dpi = 600,
  width = 14,
  height = 5,
  units = "in",
  compression = "lzw"
)
```
